relations.note: The known-safe pairs enforce the WCAG contrast minimums.

quotes: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold
Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair.
WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold
Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Ensure legible, accessible text/background contrast and non-color-dependent meaning.
rules.rule_text: Test contrast levels (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. Meet WCAG AA minimums: 4.5:1 for body text (ratio.contrast.body = 4.5:1) and 3:1 for large text ≥24px or 19px bold (ratio.contrast.large = 3:1). Additionally, don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

effect.reserved_for: surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only
effect.subject: gold or sunshine as text color

quotes: golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only
Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.
Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Restrict color pairings to contrast-safe combinations and keep golds off body text.
rules.rule_text: Use only known-safe text/background pairs: Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003D74), Dark Navy (#011E45), or Graphite (#212121) on White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#E6F0F9), or Golden Sand (#FEF1C8); and White on Brand Blue, Deep Blue, or Dark Navy. Avoid Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White (fails contrast) — golds are reserved for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
